body.title: Traversal programming paradigm: DSL for cursor logic, inhibitory passes, and graph settling
body.result: Core traversal DSL shipped 2026-04-19 audit close. Primitives live: cursor_runtime.py (6bf00a7d), node_executor.py with BRANCHIF/FORKIF/SPAWNIF/EMITIF/STOPIF (ec14033b, 68de01de), inhibitory gates in gate_primitive.py (0ddc807c). pe_chain + coding engrams run on these. Out of scope for this ticket: settling dynamics (activation competition / decay-to-winner). File a separate ticket if that becomes needed — gates today are Boolean, not oscillatory.
body.description: GitHub issue #237. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
